title: New item default ordering
excerpt:
Having the option to set new items to appear at the top or bottom on the board (groups) will improve user experience. We prefer all new item to default to the top of the list. 
We use sort and save however it never seems…

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml:
Having the option to set new items to appear at the top or bottom on the board (groups) will improve user experience. We prefer all new item to default to the top of the list.

We use sort and save however it never seems to stick.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marisa!

Thanks for your feature request - I hear you on this

To put greater emphasis on this features development and consolidate votes, we are going to merge your request into the existing feature request → Move '+ Add Item' to the top of a Group

You can read more about our feature request process here: All you need to know about our feature request process

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: A post was merged into an existing topic: Move ‘+ Add Item’ to the top of a Group

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello & fantastic, thank you. I am “out of votes.”
